notes: Sentence-final 'loh' adds gentle insistence + emotional weight (DR §7 prosody finding); English equivalent 'you know' preserves the intimate-relational register. ParticleProcessor preProcess strategy: tag the particle position with [PARTICLE:loh] so the NMT does not strip it; postProcess strategy: ensure 'you know' (or equivalent) is present in the target text and add 'loh' to particlesPreserved so UX-DR7 renders the target with +0.3pt letter-spacing. This is the starter fixture used to validate the cross-platform harness end-to-end (Story 1.7 setup; expanded in Story 3.2).
